name: Core ledger
rules: Canonical state is JSON files; SQLite is a rebuildable index, not source of truth.
Every read command should support --json where practical.
All mutations go through the single core write path (lock + atomic write + event append).
Keep V1 focused on CLI, validation, events, index rebuild, and brief generation.
notes: Covers the core Waystation record model, storage behavior, event stream, validation, and index rebuild logic.
